name: @intentsolutionsio/crypto-tax-calculator
description: Calculate crypto taxes with FIFO/LIFO methods and generate tax reports

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install crypto-tax-calculator\\n  or /plugin install crypto-tax-calculator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
